name: Pre-Release Gate v0.1.2
description: Sequential audit of the entire system before release. Seven gates: lint, test, security, branding, bench, platform, docs. All gates must pass before release is authorized.

phases.name: Code Quality Checks
phases.principle: Is the code clean, consistent, and warning-free?

delegates.task_template: Run shell script linting with shellcheck on all .sh files for: ${goal}. Enforce strict mode (-o all). Flag: unquoted variables, missing error handling, non-portable constructs, unused variables. Zero warnings policy.
Run Python linting with ruff and flake8 on all .py files for: ${goal}. Enforce: E/W/F rules, import sorting, docstring presence, type hints on public APIs. Zero warnings policy.

Validate all JSON configuration files against their schemas for: ${goal}. Verify: playbooks match playbook schema, manifests match manifest schema, registry entries are well-formed. Flag any malformed JSON or schema violations.

phases.checkpoint: All linters pass with zero warnings, JSON schemas validated
phases.failure_message: Lint gate failed. Fix code quality issues before proceeding.

phases.name: Test Suite Execution
phases.principle: Do all tests pass with comprehensive coverage?

delegates.task_template: Execute full unit test suite for: ${goal}. Run pytest for Python, bats for shell scripts. Verify 90%+ line coverage. Flag any failing tests with root cause analysis.
Execute integration tests for: ${goal}. Test component interactions: CLI to core, gateway to adapters, memory subsystem. Verify end-to-end data flow integrity.
Run golden file tests for: ${goal}. Compare agent outputs against golden reference files. Flag any drift from expected behavior. Update golden files only with explicit approval.

phases.checkpoint: All test suites pass with 90%+ coverage, golden files verified
phases.failure_message: Test gate failed. Fix failing tests and coverage gaps before proceeding.

phases.name: Security Audit
phases.principle: Is the codebase secure and the supply chain clean?

delegates.task_template: Perform secret scanning for: ${goal}. Scan all files for hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords. Check .env files are gitignored. Verify no credentials in commit history. Flag severity S0-S3.
verifies: no API keys or tokens exposed

delegates.task_template: Audit dependencies for: ${goal}. Scan requirements.txt and package.json for known CVEs. Check for unmaintained packages (>12 months). Verify license compatibility. Flag typosquatting risks.
Run SAST checks for: ${goal}. Static analysis for: injection vulnerabilities, unsafe deserialization, command injection, path traversal. Verify input validation at system boundaries.

phases.checkpoint: Security scans clean, dependencies audited, no vulnerabilities
phases.failure_message: Security gate failed. Critical vulnerabilities detected. Do not release.

phases.name: Brand Consistency
phases.principle: Is the brand identity consistent across all touchpoints?

delegates.task_template: Verify version synchronization for: ${goal}. Check VERSION file, pyproject.toml, package.json, CLI --version output all match. Verify CHANGELOG.md has entry for current version. Flag any version drift.
Audit help menus for: ${goal}. Verify all CLI commands have --help text. Check consistency of flag naming conventions. Verify examples are runnable. Flag missing or outdated help text.
Validate ASCII art and branding assets for: ${goal}. Verify logo renders correctly in terminals. Check signature.txt is current. Validate branding consistency in TUI headers and splash screens.

phases.checkpoint: Version synced, help audited, branding validated
phases.failure_message: Branding gate failed. Version mismatch or branding inconsistency detected.

phases.name: Performance Gates
phases.principle: Does the system meet performance budgets?

delegates.task_template: Benchmark cold start performance for: ${goal}. Measure CLI cold start time from process spawn to first output. Target: < 50ms. Run 10 iterations, report p50/p95/p99. Flag any regression from baseline.
Measure memory footprint for: ${goal}. Profile resident memory during typical operations. Target: < 50MB peak. Check for memory leaks under sustained load. Flag unbounded growth.
Benchmark dispatch latency for: ${goal}. Measure time from task submission to agent activation. Target: < 200ms. Test single dispatch and concurrent dispatch scenarios. Flag queue bottlenecks.

phases.failure_message: Bench gate failed. Performance budgets exceeded. Optimize before release.

phases.name: Cross-Platform Validation
phases.principle: Does it work identically on all target platforms?

delegates.task_template: Verify path compatibility for: ${goal}. Check all file path operations use portable APIs. No hardcoded path separators. $HOME and XDG paths handled correctly. Verify paths work on macOS, Linux, and WSL.
verifies: paths validated on macOS, Linux, WSL

delegates.task_template: Test clipboard fallbacks for: ${goal}. Verify clipboard operations detect available backends (pbcopy, xclip, xsel, wl-copy). Test graceful degradation when no clipboard available. Flag missing fallback paths.

Verify terminal degradation for: ${goal}. Test behavior in dumb terminals, over SSH, in tmux/screen. Verify NO_COLOR is respected. Test 256-color and true-color fallbacks. Flag any hard failures on limited terminals.

phases.checkpoint: Path handling portable, clipboard fallbacks work, terminal degradation graceful
phases.failure_message: Platform gate failed. Cross-platform compatibility issues detected.

phases.name: Documentation Completeness
phases.principle: Is documentation complete, accurate, and current?

delegates.task_template: Audit README accuracy for: ${goal}. Verify installation instructions work. Test quickstart examples. Check feature list matches current functionality. Flag stale or misleading content.
Verify man page generation for: ${goal}. Check all CLI commands have man pages. Verify man page content matches --help output. Test man page rendering. Flag missing or outdated man pages.
verifies: man pages exist for all commands

delegates.task_template: Audit API documentation for: ${goal}. Verify all public APIs are documented. Check code examples compile/run. Verify OpenAPI spec matches implementation. Flag undocumented public interfaces.

phases.checkpoint: README accurate, man pages current, API docs complete
phases.failure_message: Docs gate failed. Documentation gaps or inaccuracies detected.
